titles.title: Take my life and let it be

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Take my life and let it be, Consecrated Lord to thee. Take my moments and my days /: Let them follow in ceaseless praise. :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Take my voice and let me sing Always only for my king Take my lips and let them be /: Filled with messages from thee :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Take my love my lord I pour At thy feet its treasure store Take myself and I will be /: Ever only, all for thee :/

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Ever only, all for thee Ever only, all for thee Ever only, all for thee

verse.name: v5
